nasb.text: He has remembered His covenant forever, The word which He commanded to a thousand generations,

esv.text: He remembers his covenant forever, the word that he commanded, for a thousand generations,

cnv.text: 他永遠記念他的約， 他記念他所吩咐的話，直到千代，

ccb.text: 祂永远记得祂的约， 历经千代也不忘祂的应许，

csbs.text: 他记念自己的约，直到永远； 记念他吩咐的话，直到千代——
